NeuralSync AI // Intern Machine Learning Engineer

San Francisco, CA | Intern (Full-time, 12-week summer program) | $28-32/hour

Bridging human intuition with machine intelligence for enterprise decision-making

>> ABOUT

NeuralSync AI is a Series B machine learning platform company founded in 2021, focused on
building production-grade ML solutions for Fortune 500 enterprises. We specialize in

custom model development, MLOps infrastructure, and AI governance, helping organizations
responsibly deploy machine learning at scale. Our team of 45 engineers and data

scientists is based in San Francisco with a growing presence in Austin, TX.

>> SUMMARY

Join NeuralSync AI's ML engineering team as an Intern Machine Learning Engineer this

summer! You'll work alongside senior engineers to build, train, and deploy machine
learning models for real enterprise customers. This hands-on internship will give you

exposure to the full ML lifecycle—from data preparation and feature engineering to model
evaluation and production deployment. You'll contribute to meaningful projects while

learning industry best practices in MLOps, model monitoring, and reproducible ML
workflows.

>> RESPONSIBILITIES

- Assist in data preparation, cleaning, and exploratory data analysis (EDA) using
Python and pandas under mentor guidance

- Collaborate with senior engineers to implement model training pipelines using
PyTorch or TensorFlow

- Learn to version control ML experiments using MLflow, tracking metrics, parameters,
and artifacts

- Help build and test feature engineering workflows using an internal feature store
system

- Participate in model evaluation and validation tasks, creating performance reports
and visualizations

- Support deployment and monitoring of trained models using AWS SageMaker, including
A/B testing setup

- Document code and ML workflows to ensure reproducibility and knowledge transfer
- Attend weekly ML seminar sessions and present learnings from assigned research

papers or tools

>> MUST HAVE

- Currently pursuing a Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Mathematics,

Statistics, Physics, or related field
- Strong foundational knowledge of Python programming (NumPy, Pandas, Scikit-learn)

- Understanding of machine learning fundamentals: supervised learning, classification,
regression, and model evaluation metrics

- Familiarity with Git version control and command-line tools

>> NICE TO HAVE

- Prior experience with PyTorch or TensorFlow (coursework, personal projects, or

kaggle competitions)

 - Exposure to SQL and database querying

- Experience deploying models using AWS services or equivalent cloud platforms

>> STACK

Python (NumPy, Pandas, Scikit-learn) / PyTorch / TensorFlow / MLflow / AWS SageMaker / Feature

Store (Tecton or Feast) / Git / GitHub / Jupyter Notebooks / Docker / PostgreSQL / AWS EC2 / S3

>> BENEFITS

- $500 housing stipend (Bay Area intern support)

- Flexible work schedule with option for hybrid arrangement (2 days office, 3 remote)
- Free access to LinkedIn Learning, DataCamp, and Coursera (professional development

budget: $1,000)
- Weekly catered lunches and unlimited coffee/snacks in office

- Mentorship from senior ML engineers with 1:1 meetings
- Return offer eligibility for strong performers

- Free public transit pass (BART/Muni)

>> APPLY

Apply on our careers page at neuralsync.ai/careers or submit your resume and a brief

cover letter explaining your interest in ML engineering to internships@neuralsync.ai.
Include a link to your GitHub profile if available. Phone screenings will be conducted in

rolling waves through April. We encourage applications from underrepresented groups in
tech.
